# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.14.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk-network
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.14.0
    container_name: logstash
    networks:
      - elk-network
    environment:
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx256m
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.14.0
    container_name: kibana
    networks:
      - elk-network
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm-server/apm-server:7.14.0
    container_name: apm-server
    networks:
      - elk-network
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - APM_SERVER_ENABLED=true
  apm-agent:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm-agent-python/apm-agent-python:7.14.0
    container_name: apm-agent
    networks:
      - elk-network
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - APM_SERVER_URL=http://apm-server:8200

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
